description_long: This house features a simple, boxy two-story structure with a flat, overhanging roof in a dark gray color. The exterior walls are light gray, punctuated by evenly spaced rectangular windows with dark frames on both floors, creating a symmetrical appearance. The front facade includes a central entry door flanked by windows and is accessed via a small set of steps leading to a tiled porch area enclosed by low railings. The side and rear facades maintain the window symmetry, while the left side of the house features an extended balcony or terrace area with matching railings and a tiled floor. The overall design is modern and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on clean lines. The house appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with metal or composite railings and tiled surfaces for the outdoor areas.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, and a tiled front porch with railings. The exterior is light gray with dark window frames and a spacious side terrace.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat roof, two rows of windows, and a large tiled terrace with railings on the left.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the symmetrical arrangement of windows and the full width of the flat roof.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the terrace and railings visible on the right.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main entry door, steps, tiled porch, and symmetrical window layout.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with steps, tiled porch, and low railings; minimal decorative elements.
